info.title: Candidate Ledger REST API
info.summary: Potential requests for the Ledger service
info.description: Design-time contract for the Ledger service. Direct mutation endpoints are application-command ingress for authenticated Service Actors. Human Organization Operators and Platform Operators must use durable Command Requests. Source Reference correlates related activity; Idempotency-Key identifies exactly one mutation in the Organization and calling-client namespace. Accepted Transactions are immutable, balance independently per Asset, and keep service-assigned recordedAt separate from Organization-supplied effectiveAt.

tags.name: Accounts
tags.description: Account opening, lifecycle, and immutable accounting dimensions.

tags.name: Balances
tags.description: Current operational snapshots and bitemporal Posted Balances.

tags.name: Transactions
tags.description: Immutable balanced activity, resolution, and correction requests.

tags.name: Reconciliation
tags.description: Posted activity summaries by Account and Asset.

tags.name: Audit Trail
tags.description: Attempt history and causally linked committed state changes.

tags.name: Command Requests
tags.description: Durable, attributable human-operator intents and decisions.

x-standard-error-statuses.400: Malformed request; Idempotency Key is not consumed.
x-standard-error-statuses.401: Authentication failed; Idempotency Key is not consumed.
x-standard-error-statuses.403: Authorization failed; Idempotency Key is not consumed.
x-standard-error-statuses.404: Scoped resource was not found or is hidden.
x-standard-error-statuses.409: Revision, lifecycle, approval, projection, or idempotency conflict. Idempotency consumption depends on the stable code; see x-idempotency-consumption.
x-standard-error-statuses.422: Stable authoritative business rejection; Idempotency Key is consumed for POST requests.
x-standard-error-statuses.503: Temporary unavailability; Idempotency Key is not consumed.

consumesKey: Other stable business rejections reached during authoritative evaluation
doesNotConsumeKey: IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REUSED (the original binding remains consumed; no new binding is created)

get.summary: Read the current operational Balance Snapshot
get.description: Returns current recorded state: Posted Balance, pending totals, Balance Floor, Reserve Amount effects, and nullable Available Balance. It does not answer a historical accounting question.
Returns Posted Balance through effectiveAt using only activity known by knownAt. knownAt defaults to current knowledge. Pending totals and availability are intentionally absent.
Orders by effectiveAt, recordedAt, and Transaction identifier.

get.summary: Summarize Posted activity by Account and Asset
get.description: Returns exact total debits, total credits, and debit-minus-credit net movement over an Effective At interval, optionally limited to activity known by knownAt. Empty periods return an empty items array and zero aggregate counts.
Searches attempts, including successful reads, rejections, failures, authorization failures, and idempotent replays.
Joins the Action Record to its Command Request, State Change Records, change set, and links to authoritative domain records. Protected values remain redacted.

post.summary: Submit a typed asynchronous Command Task
post.description: The authenticated actor and represented Organization are derived by the service. Durable admission returns 202 with a polling location; approval, execution, and domain rejection are represented by subsequent Command Task states.

get.summary: Read Command Task state and history

BearerAuth.description: Principal, Actor kind, calling client integration, and represented-Organization authority are established by the surrounding identity environment. Token format is intentionally unspecified.

OrganizationId.name: organizationId
OrganizationId.description: Represented Organization. Authorization must bind this value to the authenticated principal.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Identity of exactly one mutation in the namespace shared by this Organization and authenticated calling client across all endpoints and Ledgers. A consumed key remains non-reusable for at least financial-record retention.

CorrelationId.name: X-Correlation-Id
CorrelationId.description: Optional business-flow correlation. It is not retry identity.

IfMatch.name: If-Match
IfMatch.description: Expected current revision token for the target subject. A mismatch returns STALE_REVISION.

MinimumConsistencyPosition.name: minimumConsistencyPosition
MinimumConsistencyPosition.description: Opaque position returned by a successful mutation. The query either reaches it or returns PROJECTION_NOT_CURRENT.

EffectiveAtCutoff.name: effectiveAt
EffectiveAtCutoff.description: Inclusive economic-time cutoff for Posted activity.

KnownAtCutoff.name: knownAt
KnownAtCutoff.description: Inclusive Recorded At cutoff. Omission means current knowledge.

PageAfter.name: pageAfter
PageAfter.description: Opaque cursor from the prior page.

AmountFilter.name: amount
AmountFilter.description: Exact Posting amount. Combine with assetId when the numeric text is not globally distinctive.

SourceReferenceFilter.name: sourceReference
SourceReferenceFilter.description: Business correlation; several related operations may share it.

XActionId.description: Action Record for this attempt. A replay receives a new Action identifier.

XConsistencyPosition.description: Opaque committed-history position of the returned mutation outcome.

XCurrentThroughPosition.description: Opaque history position through which the returned projection is current.

RetryAfter.description: Seconds the client should wait before polling the Command Task status resource again.

Location.description: Canonical URL of the admitted Command Task status resource.

MutationCreated.description: A durable mutation outcome was created. Stable business rejection is represented as a Problem response, not as HTTP success.

Problem.description: Attempt failed, was rejected, or could not yet be served. X-Action-Id identifies this attempt when available, including replays and authentication failures.

CommandTaskAccepted.description: The Command Task was durably admitted for asynchronous approval and execution. This response is not a terminal domain outcome.

OpaqueId.description: Opaque identifier; clients must not parse structure from it.

DecimalAmount.description: Exact signed decimal quantity. Asset precision determines permitted scale; JSON floating-point values are forbidden.

PositiveDecimalAmount.description: Exact decimal quantity greater than zero at the Account Asset's permitted precision.

NonNegativeDecimalAmount.description: Exact decimal quantity greater than or equal to zero at the Account Asset's permitted precision.

NormalSide.description: Immutable Posting side that increases the Account's natural balance. It is independent of Account Role.

AccountState.description: Pending precedes opening work; Opening rejects ordinary Transactions; Open admits ordinary activity; Closing drains accepted work before terminal Closed.

MutationSuccessOutcome.description: Outcome of durably recording this HTTP mutation attempt, separate from the logical resource outcome.

PostingInput.description: The Account determines the Posting Asset. The request never supplies currency or an independently mutable Posting Asset.

sourceReference.description: Business correlation, not retry identity or a uniqueness key.

effectiveAt.description: For Posted activity this is economic time. For Pending activity this provisional field locates the commitment for period-close handling but is excluded from Point-in-Time Balance.

ReservationConsumption.description: Account-and-Asset decrease claimed from the original Pending commitment.

effectiveAt.description: Economic time for this linked Posted settlement; it cannot be later than recordedAt or on/before Ledger Closed Through.

SettlementTransactionInput.description: A linked Posted Transaction. Balancing Postings may differ from the original Pending Transaction. effectiveAt cannot be later than its server-assigned recordedAt and must be later than the Ledger Closed Through boundary.

effectiveAt.description: Provisional period-close placement for a Pending Continuation; it does not enter Posted historical balance.

ContinuationTransactionInput.description: At most one linked Pending Transaction carrying unsettled commitment.

ResolveTransactionRequest.description: Settlement plus Continuation consumption cannot exceed the Pending Transaction's Resolution Limit. Continuation-only resolution may carry the full commitment forward; zero settlement without a Continuation is a Voiding. Uncovered decreases receive a fresh Availability Check.

CorrectionTransactionRequest.description: Creates a separate Posted correction Transaction. effectiveAt cannot be later than recordedAt or on/before Ledger Closed Through.

balanceCeiling.description: Optional upper natural-sign exposure bound. It does not change the downward Available Balance calculation.

availableBalance.description: Null when the Account has no Balance Floor. A positive value is capacity, not operation permission.

overFloor.description: True when existing position or commitments exceed a newly tightened Balance Floor. Available Balance is then zero; accepted commitments remain valid.

overCeiling.description: True when existing exposure exceeds a newly tightened Balance Ceiling. New increases are blocked; existing exposure and accepted commitments remain valid.

PointInTimeBalance.description: Posted-only accounting view. Pending totals, reservations, and Available Balance are intentionally absent.

sourceReference.description: Business correlation only; related operations may share it.

recordedAt.description: Immutable service-assigned acceptance time and audit order.

netMovement.description: Natural-sign movement: Debits minus Credits for Debit-normal Accounts; Credits minus Debits for Credit-normal Accounts.

sanitizedInput.description: Explicitly audit-safe summary, redaction marker, or fingerprint.

fromState.description: Null only for creation of the durable Command Request.

CommandTransitionRecord.description: One durable approval, rejection, cancellation, expiry, execution, or failure transition and its causing Action.

sanitizedParameters.description: Only values approved for audit retention; redacted fields are represented explicitly.

idempotencyIdentity.description: Audit-safe identity or fingerprint of the consumed Idempotency Key, not necessarily the raw secret-bearing header value.

actionId.description: Action Record for this attempt, including when the logical result is replayed.

originalActionId.description: Original attempt whose logical result is returned on replay.

logicalOutcome.description: Logical result or resulting resource state. A successfully recorded Reject decision therefore has outcome Executed and logicalOutcome Rejected.

actions.description: Every causally related submission, decision, cancellation, expiry, and execution Action so each State Change causingActionId is resolvable.

closedThrough.description: Current Ledger Effective At close boundary when relevant.

idempotencyKeyConsumed.description: Present on mutating failures when the service can state whether this attempt created a durable consumed-key binding.

balanceFloor.description: Provisional operator-only intent. Null removes the floor and makes Available Balance not applicable. The change takes effect only at execution Recorded At, cannot exceed an existing Balance Ceiling, and never rewrites existing exposure or accepted commitments.

balanceCeiling.description: Null removes the upper bound. The change takes effect only at execution Recorded At, cannot fall below an existing Balance Floor, and never rewrites existing exposure or accepted commitments.

requestedEffectiveAt.description: Scheduling intent, distinct from the Transaction parameters effectiveAt.

CreateAccountParameters.description: Creates the Account in Pending with immutable Asset, Account Role, and Normal Side. State is never caller-selected.

balanceFloor.description: Null means unconstrained. Scale must match the immutable Asset.

balanceCeiling.description: Optional highest natural-sign exposure. Omission or null means no upper bound. When both bounds exist, balanceFloor cannot exceed balanceCeiling.
